selected_dialects.reason: Prismatic block with extrude_rectangle, cut_hole on multiple faces, and linear hole patterns — all covered by sketch_extrude_base main_ops.
Multiple independent hole cuts on different faces (top, bottom, front, left, right) require boolean_cut composition across oriented cuts.

selected_domain_skills.reason: Rectangular block with hole patterns on multiple faces is a classic prismatic machined part.

safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only. Not manufacturing-ready. No structural validation, no certification.
